parameters.name: filter[search]
parameters.description: Cross-column search: id, transfer_number, from_warehouse name, to_warehouse name, item SKU, item FNSKU

parameters.name: filter[transfer_type]
parameters.description: Text filter on transfer_type: standard | fba_inbound | awd

parameters.name: filter[has_inbound_plan]
parameters.description: Text filter — true | false (FBA inbound plan link)

parameters.name: filter_groups[conjunction]
parameters.description: Advanced filter tree conjunction: and | or. Use with filter_groups[children][] for grouped conditions.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort field. Prefix with - for descending. Options: id, warehouse_transfer_number, transfer_date, transfer_status, shipment_status, receipt_status, created_at, updated_at, eta, archived_at, asn_last_sent_at, status, from_warehouse_name, to_warehouse_name, from_warehouse, to_warehouse. Default: -transfer_date
